# bathytools

The goal of bathytools is to facilitate the generation of bathymetric
data for lakes and reservoirs. The package provides functions to
rasterise point depth data into a bathymetric raster. The package is
designed to work with data from the AEME project, but can be used with
any bathymetric data.

## Development

This package was developed by [LimnoTrack](http://limnotrack.com/) as
part of the Lake Ecosystem Restoration New Zealand Modelling Platform
(LERNZmp) project. [![LimnoTrack
website](reference/figures/limnotrack_border.jpg)](http://limnotrack.com/)

## Installation

You can install the development version of bathytools from GitHub with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("limnotrack/bathytools")
```

## Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to generate a bathymetric
raster from a shoreline and depth points:

``` r
library(bathytools)
## basic example code
shoreline <- readRDS(system.file("extdata/rotoma_shoreline.rds",
                                 package = "bathytools"))
depth_points <- readRDS(system.file("extdata/depth_points.rds",
                                  package = "bathytools"))
bathy <- rasterise_bathy(shoreline = shoreline, depth_points = depth_points,
                         crs = 2193)
#> Generating depth points... [2025-09-15 12:08:23]
#> Finished! [2025-09-15 12:08:23]
#> Interpolating to raster... [2025-09-15 12:08:23]
#> Adjusting depths >= 0 to  -0.82 m
#> Finished! [2025-09-15 12:08:31]
```

![](reference/figures/README-example-1.png)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`batch_lake_morphometry()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/batch_lake_morphometry.md)
  : Apply calc_lake_morphometry to a named list of SpatRasters
- [`bathy_to_hypso()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/bathy_to_hypso.md)
  : Convert bathymetry raster to hypsograph
- [`calc_bathy_diff()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/calc_bathy_diff.md)
  : Calculate the difference between observed and predicted bathymetry
- [`calc_lake_morphometry()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/calc_lake_morphometry.md)
  : Calculate comprehensive morphometric statistics from a lake
  bathymetry raster
- [`calculate_lake_volume()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/calculate_lake_volume.md)
  : Calculate the volume of a lake using bathymetry data or a hypsograph
- [`check_for_islands()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/check_for_islands.md)
  : Check for islands in a set of polygons
- [`dem_to_hypsograph()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/dem_to_hypsograph.md)
  : Extend a hypsograph from a DEM
- [`estimate_bathymetry()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/estimate_bathymetry.md)
  : Estimate bathymetry from a shoreline polygon using distance
  transformation.
- [`generate_depth_points()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/generate_depth_points.md)
  : Generate depth points for interpolation
- [`get_contours()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/get_contours.md)
  : Get contours from a bathymetric raster
- [`get_depths()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/get_depths.md)
  : Get depths for hypsograph or contours
- [`get_lake_depth()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/get_lake_depth.md)
  : Get Lake Depth from Bathymetry Raster This function calculates the
  lake depth from a bathymetric raster.
- [`get_lake_surface_elevation()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/get_lake_surface_elevation.md)
  : Get lake surface elevation from DEM
- [`get_shoreline()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/get_shoreline.md)
  : Get the shoreline from a bathymetric raster
- [`interpolate_points()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/interpolate_points.md)
  : Interpolate point depth data to a raster
- [`merge_bathy_dem()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/merge_bathy_dem.md)
  : Merge lake bathymetry raster with a DEM raster
- [`model_layer_structure`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/model_layer_structure.md)
  : Reference data frame for model layer structure.
- [`plot_raster_3d()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/plot_raster_3d.md)
  : Plot a 3D raster
- [`rasterise_bathy()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/rasterise_bathy.md)
  : Generate depth points for interpolation
- [`tm_dem_bath()`](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/reference/tm_dem_bath.md)
  : Draw a elevation map with bathymetry and surrounding topography

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Merge Bathymetry with DEM
  data](https://limnotrack.github.io/bathytools/articles/merge-bathy-dem.md):
